data.title: Global liquid biopsy market to hit USD 7.05 billion by 2030, driven by rising cancer cases & technological advancements.
data.description: The global liquid biopsy market has shown significant growth, increasing from US$3.65 billion in 2024 to US$4.03 billion in 2025. Forecasts project a robust CAGR of 11.8% from 2025 to 2030, reaching a valuation of US$7.05 billion by then. Key drivers include the rising cancer incidence, adoption of precision medicine, and technological advancements. Liquid biopsy offers a minimally invasive way to detect cancer biomarkers, aiding in early disease detection and personalized treatment. Beyond oncology, its applications extend to non-invasive prenatal testing and organ transplantation monitoring. Technological innovations like next-generation sequencing and digital PCR enhance the sensitivity and reliability of liquid biopsy, making it a valuable tool in various healthcare settings.

data.title: Global AI Inc. has appointed Scott Clark as Chief Revenue Officer to drive growth and global adoption of AI solutions.
data.description: An experienced technology executive, revenue leader, and author in the field of AI has recently joined Global AI with the aim of enhancing growth and worldwide acceptance of AI solutions and advisory services.

data.title: Management Board of PST Group AB reviewed tender offer by AB HISK to delist shares from AB Nasdaq Vilnius on 22 August 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, the Management Board of PST Group AB reviewed a tender offer from AB "HISK" to delist shares of PST Group AB from trading on AB Nasdaq Vilnius. After examining the details of the offer, the Management Board presented their opinion on the matter.

data.title: China's stablecoin won't enter mainland circulation.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that unemployment rates have dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The latest data also shows that the economy added 250,000 new jobs, exceeding expectations and beating last month's numbers by 50,000. Additionally, wages have increased by 3.5% compared to last year. These positive economic indicators have sparked optimism among both investors and consumers.

data.title: Boeing Co.'s offer rejected by 3,200 machinists seeking bigger gains in a strike standoff. Package included 20% wage increase and $5,000 bonus.
data.description: Boeing Co.'s defense operations in Missouri and Illinois are at a standstill due to a strike by 3,200 machinists demanding better pay and benefits. Union leaders, accompanied by Democratic congressman Wesley Bell, have shown support for the workers on strike. Boeing stands by its rejected offer, claiming it to be robust, with an average wage growth of 40%. The proposed package included a 20% wage increase, a $5,000 ratification bonus, as well as additional vacation and sick leave. IAM International President Brian Bryant expressed readiness to resume negotiations, although no new talks have been planned. Boeing's St. Louis executive, Dan Gillian, defended the company's stance amid the ongoing strike.

data.title: Bosch introduces new 500 Series dishwasher line with Zone Wash Spray Arm, targeting new consumer groups.
data.description: A leading appliance brand, Bosch, launched their latest line of dishwashers, the 500 Series, in Irvine, California. The new product line showcases advanced technology, featuring the innovative Zone Wash Spray Arm.

data.title: Tractor Supply partners with Molly Yeh to launch women's apparel line, prices range from $19.99 to $59.99.
data.description: Brentwood, Tennessee - Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO), the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the U.S., revealed a new women's apparel line in collaboration with renowned cookbook author, Food Network host, and beet farmer, Molly Yeh. Designed to reflect the lifestyle of Tractor Supply customers, the collection includes sturdy and practical clothing in vibrant and adaptable styles. Prices for the items in the collection vary from $19.99 to $59.99, with select pieces available for purchase.
